meaning: adj.图林根的,图林根人的,图林根文化的
examples: The Thuringian gang which made video jokes about its victims was itself no joke.
Meerkats warm up underneath a heater in their snow-covered outdoor enclosure at the Thuringian Zoo in Erfurt, Germany.
A man cleans the street with a snowblower after heavy snowfall in the Thuringian Forest in Oberhof, Germany, Thursday, Dec. 2, 2010. AP / Jens Meyer
